name: personal_website
app_description: Haley's public interface connecting projects, architecture work, demos, and writing.
key_user_flows: enter through the homepage and discover featured work
navigate between About, Projects, Writing, and project detail pages
open the QA Agents project and demo routes
follow internal links between project explanations, demos, and supporting pages
render the static site successfully for GitHub Pages
risk_areas: divergence between recorded demo claims and published artifacts
test_priorities: validate source formatting and Astro types
validate internal links against production output
keep uncollected interaction and accessibility evidence explicit
constraints: do not modify website source files during a QA run
do not publish secrets or local filesystem paths
do not claim browser coverage unless a browser actually ran
do not claim accessibility coverage unless an accessibility tool actually ran
treat successful build validation and rendered interaction validation as separate evidence types
autonomous code changes are not allowed
findings must remain traceable to commands, artifacts, or explicit missing evidence

known_evidence_gaps.summary: The current run validates source integrity, build output, and internal links, but does not validate rendered interactions, accessibility, screenshots, or responsive layouts.
